Class AnalyticsServiceImpl

java.lang.Object
com.wealthpro.analytics.service.AnalyticsServiceImpl
All Implemented Interfaces:
AnalyticsService
@Service @Transactional public class AnalyticsServiceImpl extends Object implements AnalyticsService
Implementation of AnalyticsService containing simulated core business logic for:
  • Daily and monthly return calculations
  • Risk assessment (volatility, drawdown, VaR, tracking error)
  • Compliance breach detection and lifecycle management

All calculations use dummy/simulated data for Phase-1 demonstration.

Version:
2.0
Author:
WealthPro Team

  • Method Details

    • getPerformanceByAccountId

      @Transactional(readOnly=true) @Cacheable(value="performanceRecords", key="#accountId") public List<PerformanceRecordResponseDTO> getPerformanceByAccountId(Long accountId)
      Description copied from interface: AnalyticsService
      Retrieve all performance records for an account.
      Specified by:
      getPerformanceByAccountId in interface AnalyticsService

    • calculateDailyReturn

      @CacheEvict(value="performanceRecords", key="#accountId") public PerformanceRecordResponseDTO calculateDailyReturn(Long accountId, Long portfolioId)
      Calculate simulated daily return for an account and persist the record. Uses dummy market data to produce a realistic-looking return percentage.

      Simulates a daily return by generating a random return between -3% and +5%. A benchmark return (e.g. Nifty 50) is also generated for comparison.

      Specified by:
      calculateDailyReturn in interface AnalyticsService

    • calculateMonthlyReturn

      @CacheEvict(value="performanceRecords", key="#accountId") public PerformanceRecordResponseDTO calculateMonthlyReturn(Long accountId, Long portfolioId)
      Calculate simulated monthly return by aggregating daily returns.

      Aggregates existing daily records for the past 30 days using geometric-style compounding (simplified). If no daily records exist, a simulated monthly return is generated.

      Specified by:
      calculateMonthlyReturn in interface AnalyticsService

    • getRiskMeasuresByAccountId

      @Transactional(readOnly=true) @Cacheable(value="riskMeasures", key="#accountId") public List<RiskMeasureResponseDTO> getRiskMeasuresByAccountId(Long accountId)
      Description copied from interface: AnalyticsService
      Retrieve all risk measures for an account.
      Specified by:
      getRiskMeasuresByAccountId in interface AnalyticsService

    • runRiskAssessment

      @CacheEvict(value="riskMeasures", key="#accountId") public List<RiskMeasureResponseDTO> runRiskAssessment(Long accountId)
      Run a full risk assessment — calculates VOLATILITY, MAX_DRAWDOWN, VAR_95, and TRACKING_ERROR using simulated data.

      Calculates four risk metrics with dummy/simulated market data:

      • VOLATILITY: annualised standard deviation (simulated 5%–25%)
      • MAX_DRAWDOWN: peak-to-trough loss (simulated -2% to -20%)
      • VAR_95: Value-at-Risk at 95% confidence (simulated 1%–5%)
      • TRACKING_ERROR: deviation from benchmark (simulated 0.5%–4%)

      Specified by:
      runRiskAssessment in interface AnalyticsService

    • getBreachesByAccountId

      @Transactional(readOnly=true) public List<ComplianceBreachResponseDTO> getBreachesByAccountId(Long accountId)
      Description copied from interface: AnalyticsService
      Retrieve all compliance breaches for an account.
      Specified by:
      getBreachesByAccountId in interface AnalyticsService

    • runComplianceScan

      public List<ComplianceBreachResponseDTO> runComplianceScan(Long accountId)
      Run a compliance scan detecting CONCENTRATION, EXPOSURE_LIMIT, and RESTRICTED_SECURITY violations using simulated rules.

      Scans for three types of violations using simulated portfolio data:

      • CONCENTRATION: single holding > 15% of portfolio
      • EXPOSURE_LIMIT: sector exposure > 30%
      • RESTRICTED_SECURITY: holding a sanctioned/restricted security
      Uses random chance (30%) to simulate whether each violation is detected.

      Specified by:
      runComplianceScan in interface AnalyticsService
